---
name: 📚 Documentation improvement
about: Report a docs drift, broken link, translation gap, or unclear section
labels: documentation
---

## Type of docs issue

- [ ] Drift / stale information (docs disagree with current code)
- [ ] Broken link
- [ ] Translation gap (en/ja inconsistency)
- [ ] Unclear / missing explanation
- [ ] Typo / grammar
- [ ] Other

## Affected files

<!-- Which docs files are affected? Paste the relative paths. -->

- `docs/.../X.md`
- `tests/docs/X.md`
- `README.md` / `README.ja.md`
- ...

## Current state

<!-- Quote the problematic text or section. -->

> e.g. "kiwa supports anvil version 0.1" (but actual minimum is 0.3)

## Suggested fix

<!-- What should the text say instead? -->

## Reason

<!-- Why is the current text incorrect / misleading? -->

## Additional context

<!-- Related Issues, screenshots, or examples. -->
